mapper.select: SELECT server_id AS serverId, activity_profile AS activityProfile, pve_multiplier AS pveMultiplier, pvp_multiplier AS pvpMultiplier, economy_multiplier AS economyMultiplier, production_multiplier AS productionMultiplier, social_multiplier AS socialMultiplier, growth_multiplier AS growthMultiplier, chat_multiplier AS chatMultiplier, daytime_production_multiplier AS daytimeProductionMultiplier, night_pvp_multiplier AS nightPvpMultiplier, enabled, update_time AS updateTime FROM simulation_server_profile

SELECT server_id AS serverId, activity_profile AS activityProfile, pve_multiplier AS pveMultiplier, pvp_multiplier AS pvpMultiplier, economy_multiplier AS economyMultiplier, production_multiplier AS productionMultiplier, social_multiplier AS socialMultiplier, growth_multiplier AS growthMultiplier, chat_multiplier AS chatMultiplier, daytime_production_multiplier AS daytimeProductionMultiplier, night_pvp_multiplier AS nightPvpMultiplier, enabled, update_time AS updateTime FROM simulation_server_profile WHERE server_id = #{serverId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO simulation_server_profile ( server_id, activity_profile, pve_multiplier, pvp_multiplier, economy_multiplier, production_multiplier, social_multiplier, growth_multiplier, chat_multiplier, daytime_production_multiplier, night_pvp_multiplier, enabled, update_time ) VALUES ( #{serverId}, #{activityProfile}, #{pveMultiplier}, #{pvpMultiplier}, #{economyMultiplier}, #{productionMultiplier}, #{socialMultiplier}, #{growthMultiplier}, #{chatMultiplier}, #{daytimeProductionMultiplier}, #{nightPvpMultiplier}, #{enabled}, #{updatedTime} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE activity_profile = VALUES(activity_profile), pve_multiplier = VALUES(pve_multiplier), pvp_multiplier = VALUES(pvp_multiplier), economy_multiplier = VALUES(economy_multiplier), production_multiplier = VALUES(production_multiplier), social_multiplier = VALUES(social_multiplier), growth_multiplier = VALUES(growth_multiplier), chat_multiplier = VALUES(chat_multiplier), daytime_production_multiplier = VALUES(daytime_production_multiplier), night_pvp_multiplier = VALUES(night_pvp_multiplier), enabled = VALUES(enabled), update_time = VALUES(update_time)
mapper.select: SELECT id, server_id AS serverId, channel, content, weight, enabled, update_time AS updateTime FROM simulation_chat_template WHERE server_id = #{serverId} ORDER BY id ASC
